title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.970 - Severability
text:
115.970.  Severability. — If any provision of this act* or the application thereof to anyone or to any circumstance is held invalid, the remainder of those sections and the application of such provisions to others or other circumstances shall not be affected thereby.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1878 § 1) 
* "This act" (H.B. 1878, 2022) contained numerous sections.  Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
